title: HuggingFace Open Source Models Integration
one_liner: Old request to support HuggingFace LLMs/embeddings; GPTR now supports many providers via generic langchain init, so this is effectively addressed/stale and can be closed pointing to current LLM docs.

title: Change/Add Code interpreter on user input
one_liner: Vague request about toggling a 'code interpreter' field in the UI; underspecified and stale (2024), needs clarification or close.

title: Add support for GPT to research from images (.png/.jpg/.jpeg) and OCR
one_liner: Feature request to support image inputs/OCR and embedding scraped images in reports; multiple volunteers but no merged PR — Assaf should decide scope/assignment.

title: No references are returned for detailed reports on local data
one_liner: References for local docs are missing because they derive from visited_urls; reporter proposed tracking sources in ContextCompressor — likely partially addressed already but worth verifying against current source-tracking code.

title: Title of scraped articles not scraped
one_liner: Scrapers previously didn't return titles causing hallucinated reference titles; current code extracts title (extract_title) and threads it through scraper.py, so this is fixed — verify and close (PR #1118).

title: Support disabling of API response streaming via config
one_liner: Streaming is hardcoded in actions.py; add a config flag to disable streaming for LLMs/APIs that mishandle it (still relevant per 2025 GPT-5 streaming comment).

title: Crashes instead of graceful message when no answers found / bad LLM JSON
one_liner: Detailed report crashes with AttributeError when subtopics LLM JSON parse fails (non-GPT models); wrap get_sub_queries/subtopics parsing to return empty list gracefully.

title: ERROR: Exception in ASGI application when running with Ollama
one_liner: Reporter confirmed it works after upgrading the pip package and pulling latest; resolved — close.

title: Publisher agent 'directory not found' with multi-agent + local docs
one_liner: multi_agents publisher_agent fails to save report when output dir doesn't exist; likely an mkdir(exist_ok) fix, but reporter never confirmed on latest — ask for repro on current version or close as stale.

title: openai BadRequest error
one_liner: Bare OpenAI BadRequest traceback with no model/config details; stale (2024) and under-specified — needs info or close.

title: Using OpenAI Batch endpoint
one_liner: Request to integrate OpenAI Batch API for cost savings; architecturally significant (batch is async/offline) — maintainer decision, likely won't-fix given GPTR's interactive flow.

title: gpt-researcher pip package ships messy file structure (backend/, etc.)
one_liner: The published wheel includes top-level backend/ and other dirs polluting site-packages; tighten packaging (find_packages/include) in setup.py/pyproject — verify against current packaging config.

title: Unlogged error while using Groq (missing langchain-groq)
one_liner: Groq import failure is swallowed and shown as a misleading JSON-repair warning; log the real exception in choose_agent/get_llm so missing langchain-groq is actionable.

title: Possible embedding bug (runaway embedding cost, process stuck)
one_liner: Embeddings appear to loop/explode in cost on large local content; hard to act without repro details (doc size, config) — needs info, possibly related to chunking/max_results.

title: Agent is not using my documents ('my documents' still web-searches)
one_liner: Selecting 'my documents' report_source still triggers web search per reporter (Azure config); needs repro on current report_source routing — recurring complaint, worth maintainer triage.

title: PDFs are not always scraped correctly (non-.pdf URLs)
one_liner: scraper.py picks PyMuPDFScraper only when link.endswith('.pdf') (line 201); SemanticScholar returns PDF links without the extension — detect PDF by content-type/header instead of suffix.

title: Mistral embedding bug ("An error occurred with MistralAI: 'data'")
one_liner: Mistral embeddings raise a KeyError 'data' during context retrieval; likely a response-shape/batching mismatch in the embeddings wrapper — reproduce with Mistral embedding provider and fix parsing.

title: Best way to impose a global rate limit on LLM interactions
one_liner: Request for a built-in/configurable global rate limiter to avoid provider 429s; langchain supports InMemoryRateLimiter — maintainer should decide whether to wire it into config.

title: Error parsing dimension value 100%: invalid literal for int() base 10 '100%'
one_liner: Image/dimension parsing chokes on percentage values like '100%' (int() cast) during image extraction; guard non-numeric width/height in get_relevant_images. Non-fatal but noisy.

title: Cannot set custom variables via config.json (TOTAL_WORDS ignored)
one_liner: User reports config.json passed via config_path is ignored; load_config now reads the JSON file so likely fixed or a key-casing/path issue — verify on current config.py and reply, or fix if keys still not applied.

title: Tavily - Too Many Requests (429) -> empty response
one_liner: Tavily 429 leads to empty report; mostly a free-tier rate-limit/usage issue — reply with retry/backoff guidance and graceful fallback note, close unless we want retry logic in the Tavily retriever.

title: [Feature] Add API tool to agents + vector store for tool retrieval
one_liner: Proposal to let agents call arbitrary APIs as tools, indexed in a vector store for retrieval; large architectural feature (overlaps with MCP support) — maintainer direction needed.

title: Send 400/500 error status on Internal Server Error
one_liner: Server errors leave the UI hanging with no status; add try/catch in the main request/websocket handler and surface errors to the client (raised by collaborator ElishaKay).

title: Possible License Issue (PyMuPDF AGPL-3.0)
one_liner: PyMuPDF is AGPL-3.0, which conflicts with GPTR's permissive license for SaaS users; maintainer should decide whether to swap to a permissively-licensed PDF parser (e.g. pypdf) or make it optional.

title: OpenAI API Key required even when .env has DeepSeek settings
one_liner: Default EMBEDDING is still 'openai:text-embedding-3-small', so OpenAI key is demanded even with DeepSeek LLMs; users must also set EMBEDDING — improve error/docs and validate embedding config (recurring, latest comment 2026-05).

title: Add open-source provider AI/ML API
one_liner: Vendor (aimlapi.com) offering to contribute an AI/ML API provider integration; maintainer green-light decision — likely accept as a community PR given generic provider support.
